iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.branch.CfnAbo: A group of signals that are defined in a hierarchical structure.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.branch.Descri.Description: (Optional) A brief description of the branch.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.branch.FullyQ.Description: The fully qualified name of the branch. For example, the fully qualified name of a branch might be `Vehicle.Body.Engine`.
